## Feature Description
Kya feature chahiye?

## Problem Solved
Yeh feature kya problem solve karega?

## Proposed Solution
Kaise implement kiya jaye?

## Alternatives Considered
Aur kya approaches try kiye?

## Additional Context
Screenshots, diagrams, references, etc.
